title: Buyers and Purchasing Agents, Farm Products
description: Purchase farm products either for further processing or resale. Includes tree farm contractors, grain brokers and market operators, grain buyers, and tobacco buyers. May negotiate contracts.

tasks.text: Purchase, for further processing or for resale, farm products, such as milk, grains, or Christmas trees.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange for processing or resale of purchased products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Negotiate contracts with farmers for the production or purchase of farm products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange for transportation or storage of purchased products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain records of business transactions and product inventories, reporting data to companies or government agencies as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Review orders to determine product types and quantities required to meet demand.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Examine or test crops or products to estimate their value, determine their grade, or locate any evidence of disease or insect damage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate or direct activities of workers engaged in cutting, transporting, storing, or milling products and maintaining records.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Sell supplies, such as seed, feed, fertilizers, or insecticides, arranging for loans or financing as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise farm groups or growers on land preparation or livestock care techniques that will maximize the quantity and quality of production.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Estimate land production possibilities, surveying property and studying factors such as crop rotation history, soil fertility, or irrigation facilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
